name: Mistral AI
one_liner: European AI lab developing open-weight and proprietary large language models, AI assistants, and enterprise AI services.

lead_investors: consortium of seven banks (incl. HSBC, Credit Agricole CIB)

ambiguities: Headcount varies across sources: Tracxn reports 1,093 (Apr 2026), Revelio Labs reports 934 (Dec 2025), PitchBook reports 860, and GetLatka reports 276 — Tracxn (most recent) used as primary estimate.

Total funding figure of ~$3.9B (Clay) includes equity and debt across all rounds; Tracxn reports $3.05B equity rounds only; TechCrunch cites $3.1B as of March 2026 per Crunchbase. The $3.9B figure inclusive of the $830M March 2026 debt round is used.
Series C post-money valuation: official Mistral press release states €11.7B (~$13.7B USD); Bloomberg/Wikipedia report €12B ($14B). Official press release figure used.
The most recent 'round' is a March 2026 debt financing of $830M from a bank consortium; the last equity round remains Series C (Sep 2025) led by ASML.
